data.title: UroMems gets FDA and ANSM approval for UroActive® Smart Implant study on male SUI, following successful trials in France.
data.description: After demonstrating successful feasibility clinical results in France, UroMems has gained approval for its IDE in both Grenoble, France, and Minneapolis. The company is known for its cutting-edge mechatronics technology designed to address stress urinary incontinence (SUI). This development comes as UroMems continues to make significant strides in the medical field, showcasing the growing interest in its innovative solutions. The approval in both countries highlights the widespread recognition and acceptance of the company's technology, marking a significant milestone in its journey.

data.title: Interactive Brokers (IBKR) will report Q2 earnings on July 17, with estimated EPS of 45 cents and revenue of $1.37 billion. Daily trades saw an increase of 40%. Stock price closed at $59.45.
data.description: Interactive Brokers Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: IBKR) is set to announce its second-quarter earnings after the market closes on Thursday, July 17. Analysts are predicting earnings of 45 cents per share, a slight increase from the 44 cents per share reported in the same period last year. Revenue for the quarter is expected to be around $1.37 billion, up from $1.23 billion a year ago. In June, the company reported 3.448 million daily average revenue trades, marking a significant 40% increase from the previous year. Despite this, Interactive Brokers' shares experienced a slight 0.3% drop, closing at $59.45 on Wednesday. For more details and analysis, readers can visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga.

data.title: SEGG Media discloses more info on investment with Veloce Media Group. Revelation includes key figures.
data.description: In the latest report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has soared to 10%, with over 6 million people currently out of work. Additionally, the GDP has experienced a sharp decline of 8% in the last quarter, marking the worst economic downturn in decades. The government has announced a stimulus package of $500 billion to help combat the financial crisis and support struggling businesses. Experts are warning that the situation may worsen before it improves, urging for immediate action to prevent further damage to the economy.

data.title: Bitcoin transitions from mere asset to financial powerhouse with new DeFi utilities, wrapped assets, and bridges covered in Clear Crypto Podcast.
data.description: In the latest episode of the Clear Crypto Podcast, it explores the evolution of Bitcoin from a passive asset to a functional financial tool. This transformation is facilitated by the introduction of wrapped assets, bridges, and innovative DeFi applications. Bitcoin's role is evolving, demonstrating its adaptability and utility beyond just being a store of value. Tune in to learn more about how Bitcoin is expanding its impact in the financial industry through these new developments.

data.title: Panacea Healthcare launches RevenueRx™ to assist hospitals in improving patient access and revenue optimization.
data.description: Panacea Healthcare Solutions, a renowned provider of revenue cycle and compliance services, has introduced RevenueRx: Drug Assistance Program on July 17, 2025, in St. Paul, Minnesota. This comprehensive service is designed to aid hospitals and infusion centers in guaranteeing patient access to necessary medications.

data.title: AWAKE Chocolate receives $8 million CAD investment for growth and expansion.
data.description: AWAKE Chocolate, a company based in Mississauga, Ontario, revealed on July 17, 2025, its plans to drive rapid growth and expand its market presence. The company specializes in producing tasty and energizing caffeinated chocolate bites and bars. This announcement came following the completion of a prosperous $8 million CAD investment round.

data.title: Building Controls & Solutions (BCS) appoints new execs to boost strategic growth. Key changes made in leadership team.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, in Dallas, Building Controls & Solutions (BCS), a prominent distributor specializing in energy management, building automation, and gas detection solutions, revealed significant updates to its executive leadership. These changes are aimed at enhancing the company's expansion efforts.
Chair of China's House Committee published a message on X about the sales of NVIDIA and H20 chips.

data.title: INVL Technology transferred 97 shares to employees on July 16, 2025. Total issued shares data announced.
data.description: On July 16, 2025, INVL Technology transferred 97 shares to employees of its subsidiaries. These employees have the right to exercise their option under signed agreements. As of the same date, INVL Technology has issued a total of shares.

data.title: LA Arts Recovery Fund grants $1.42M to 13 arts organizations in LA County, recognizing vital infrastructure.
data.description: Thirteen arts service organizations in Los Angeles County have been awarded grants totaling $1.42 million from the LA Arts Recovery Fund. The funding highlights the crucial infrastructure that supports the thriving arts scene in LA. This announcement was made on July 17, 2025, showcasing the significant investment in sustaining the cultural vitality of the region.

data.title: SUPPLE introduces SUPPLE Squad to aid military, veterans, first responders, and K9s with orthopedic needs. NEENAH, Wis., July 17, 2025.
data.description: A new orthopedic performance drink supplement is now on the market to cater to the distinct physical needs of military personnel and their canine partners. Developed in NEENAH, Wis., the supplement, called SUPPLE, is a fast-acting, premium joint health dietary product designed to be effective within 7 days. It aims to support the well-being of America's defenders, both human and canine, by providing essential nutrients to enhance joint health.

data.title: MiningToken has launched a free multi-currency mining app enabling users to mine Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Litecoin daily without any investment. Coins can be earned instantly with no hardware or fees, making crypto mining accessible globally.
data.description: In Zurich, Switzerland, on July 17, 2025, MiningToken introduced a new multi-currency free mining application. This app allows users to mine Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH), and Litecoin (LTC) daily without any cost. The goal is to provide simple, eco-friendly, and profitable crypto mining globally. The app uses a renewable-powered cloud network for mining, and users can register, activate the app, and begin earning without any deposits, hardware, or fees. The earnings are directly credited to the user's wallet. The app supports BTC, ETH, and LTC, optimizes coin allocation for better earnings, and provides instant daily income. Mining for these cryptocurrencies is now easily accessible on browsers and mobile devices, enabling broad participation. More information can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Verisk to acquire SuranceBay to boost life & annuity offerings. SuranceBay joins FAST platform for carrier efficiency.
data.description: SuranceBay has partnered with Verisk's FAST platform to boost efficiency within the distribution ecosystem. This collaboration aims to streamline processes for carriers and improve overall operational efficiency. Through this partnership, SuranceBay seeks to maximize its reach and better serve its clients. The integration of SuranceBay into Verisk's FAST platform is expected to positively impact a wide range of stakeholders in the industry.
